candidate_problems.text: What specific criticism mechanisms are sufficient to turn LLM proposal generation into a genuinely self-revising conjecture-and-criticism system rather than a more elaborate recombination engine?
Where is the threshold between constraints that reduce search to explanatory structure and constraints that merely collapse novelty back into reproduction of priors?
Can recursive improvement of conjecture filters occur without external grounding, or does it eventually stall in self-referential selection loops?
